title: MapObj value trait implementations
description:
Add *MapObj cases to all trait functions in pkg/vm/builtins.go.

1. In Equal() (via the Value.Equal method in value.go): Add case *MapObj that compares Count, then iterates sa.Buckets checking that sb has matching key→value pairs.

2. In StringValue() (value.go): Add case *MapObj that renders as "{key1: val1, key2: val2}" or "{}" for empty.

3. In displayObject() (builtins.go): Add case *MapObj with same format but using displayValue for keys/values.

4. In deepClone() (builtins.go): Add case *MapObj that deep-clones all bucket entries' keys and values, allocates a new MapObj via heap.Alloc.

5. In hashValue() (builtins.go): Add case *MapObj that XORs hashes of all entries for order-independent hashing.

6. In deepCompare() (builtins.go): Add case *MapObj that compares by Count (maps with same count are equal in ordering).

See goal spec section 1.6 for exact implementations of each case.
